title: Spicy Moroccan Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and aromatic stir fry dish that combines the spices of Morocco with the crunch of stir-fried vegetables.
instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the mixed bell peppers and onions and cook for 3-4 minutes until they start to soften.
Add the silky tofu and stir-fry sauce and cook for another 2-3 minutes until the tofu is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Stir in the Moroccan spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
